SEARCH
Module storm.core
Package st.orm.core.template.impl

Interface ModelBuilder

public interface ModelBuilder
Builder for creating a model.
Since:
1.2

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    <T extends Data, ID>
    Model<T,ID>
    build(Class<T> type, boolean requirePrimaryKey)
    Builds the model for the specified data type.
    default <T extends Data, ID>
    Model<T,ID>
    build(T record, boolean requirePrimaryKey)
    Builds the model for the data type of the specified record.
    ColumnNameResolver
    columnNameResolver()
    Returns the column name resolver for the model.
    ModelBuilder

    Sets the column name resolver for the model.

    Returns the foreign key resolver for the model.

    Sets the foreign key resolver for the model.

    Creates a new instance of the model builder.

  • Method Details

    • newInstance

      static ModelBuilder newInstance()
      Creates a new instance of the model builder.
      Returns:
      a new instance of the model builder.

    • tableNameResolver

      TableNameResolver tableNameResolver()
      Returns the table name resolver for the model.

    • tableNameResolver

      ModelBuilder tableNameResolver(@Nullable TableNameResolver tableNameResolver)
      Sets the table name resolver for the model.
      Parameters:
      tableNameResolver - the table name resolver.
      Returns:
      this model builder.

    • columnNameResolver

      ColumnNameResolver columnNameResolver()
      Returns the column name resolver for the model.

      ModelBuilder columnNameResolver(@Nullable ColumnNameResolver columnNameResolver)
      Sets the column name resolver for the model.
      Parameters:
      columnNameResolver - the column name resolver.
      Returns:
      this model builder.

    • foreignKeyResolver

      ForeignKeyResolver foreignKeyResolver()
      Returns the foreign key resolver for the model.

      ModelBuilder foreignKeyResolver(@Nullable ForeignKeyResolver foreignKeyResolver)
      Sets the foreign key resolver for the model.
      Parameters:
      foreignKeyResolver - the foreign key resolver.
      Returns:
      this model builder.

    • build

      default <T extends Data, ID> Model<T,ID> build(@Nonnull T record, boolean requirePrimaryKey) throws SqlTemplateException
      Builds the model for the data type of the specified record.
      Type Parameters:
      ID - the primary key type.
      Parameters:
      record - the record to build the model for.
      Returns:
      the model.
      Throws:
      SqlTemplateException - if an error occurs while building the model.

    • build

      <T extends Data, ID> Model<T,ID> build(@Nonnull Class<T> type, boolean requirePrimaryKey) throws SqlTemplateException
      Builds the model for the specified data type.
      Type Parameters:
      ID - the primary key type.
      Parameters:
      type - the record type.
      Returns:
      the model.
      Throws:
      SqlTemplateException - if an error occurs while building the model.

    • supplier

      default <T extends Data, ID> Supplier<Model<T,ID>> supplier(@Nonnull Class<T> type, boolean requirePrimaryKey)
      Returns a supplier for the model.
      Type Parameters:
      T - the record type.
      ID - the primary key type.
      Parameters:
      type - the record type.
      requirePrimaryKey - true if the primary key is required, false otherwise.
      Returns:
      a supplier for the model.
